_comment: Cross-protocol concentrated-liquidity / staking position-manager ABI vocabulary. These are de-facto ABI standards (Uniswap V3 NonfungiblePositionManager + V4 PositionManager, reused verbatim by PancakeSwap V3, SushiSwap V3, Angle, Aura, MasterChef forks) and ERC-721 transfer topics. Shared single source of truth for LpPositionLifecycleSupport + LpPositionCorrelationSupport so the coupled classify/correlate selector sets can never drift apart (a drift would split an LP entry/exit correlation and corrupt AVCO).
